title: Synaps Engineering
tagline: disciplined agentic delivery — evidence before completion
rationale: Agentic engineering toolkit: a terminal-deep blue-black canvas with a cyan signal accent reading as 'active/verified'. JetBrains Mono headings make it feel like a developer tool; Inter keeps the UI crisp. State colors map to the plan lifecycle — slate todo, cyan doing, teal done, red blocked, violet review.
